# EDITH

> EDITH is a SaaS that audits AI-built Next.js apps before they ship — security, SEO, AI-surface, performance, accessibility, dependencies — and emits fix prompts formatted for Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, and v0.

EDITH stands for "Every Deploy Inspected. Thoroughly. Honestly." It scans GitHub repos via a GitHub App, runs 100+ checks across 10 dimensions, and produces:

- **EDITH Score** — overall posture (0-100)
- **Debt Score** — technical-debt density
- **Test Score** — test coverage + reliability of existing tests
- **SEO Score** — per-page, with six sub-grades (Technical Foundation, Core Web Vitals, Content Structure, Indexability, Discoverability, AI Readiness)

It also includes:

- A browser extension that captures real-user Core Web Vitals plus DOM snapshots
- A Google Search Console integration for real ranking data
- An LLM citation tracker that asks Claude what it knows about your brand
- Auto-PR for trivial SEO fixes (missing lang, missing robots.txt, missing metadata exports, missing llms.txt)
- An MCP server so AI coding agents can query EDITH directly

## Docs
- [Getting started](https://edith.expert/docs)
- [GitHub App install](https://edith.expert/dashboard)
- [MCP integration](https://edith.expert/integrations/mcp)
- [Browser extension](https://edith.expert/extension)
- [Pricing](https://edith.expert/pricing)

## Public report links
EDITH scan reports are public at `https://edith.expert/r/<scan-id>` once a user opts in. They're meant to be shareable in PRs, Slack, and docs.

## About
- [What EDITH does](https://edith.expert)
- [Changelog](https://edith.expert/changelog)
- [Compliance / SOC2 status](https://edith.expert/compliance)
